name: Ringowurm, the Dragon Guarding the Hundred Apples
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>百檎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひゃっきん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－リンゴブルム
desc: If a face-up non-Effect Monster is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase, if you Synchro Summoned this turn: You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "Hundred Apples Token" (Wyrm/LIGHT/Level 2/ATK 100/DEF 100). The player who Summoned it can treat it as a Tuner for a Synchro Summon. You can only use each effect of "Ringowurm, the Dragon Guarding the Hundred Apples" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up non-Effect Monster is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
